name: Stuffed Baked Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 cup chopped broccoli, spinach, or mixed vegetables
(I used a frozen mixture of broc, cauliflower and carrots)
1/4 cup milk or soy milk, warmed
Few tablespoons of ricotta cheese (vegans may omit)
Sprinkling of parmesan cheese (vegans may omit)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Bake potatoes by piercing all over with a knife and placing directly on the oven rack (unwrapped and un-oiled) for 1 hour or more, until done.
3. Slice a strip off the top of each potato and scoop out the insides, leaving the skin intact.
4. Place potato insides into a bowl, mash with milk.
5. Add chopped vegetables, garlic, optional ricotta, optional parmesan, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
6. Scoop back into potato skins, piling high.
7. Sprinkle with a little more parmesan, if desired.
8. Place back into the 350°F oven, heating through for 20 minutes.
